causes.name: Tree Planting
causes.description: The Arbor Day Foundation plants, nurtures, and celebrates trees across the United States.
causes.actionUnitDescription: tree being planted in Arbor Day forests

causes.description: The Tampa Bay Estuary Program works within the Tampa Bay to restore and protect Florida seagrass. As a landmark habitat and keystone species in the bay, seagrass conservation indirectly protects the entire ecosystem.
causes.actionUnitDescription: square meter of seagrass being preserved for one year
causes.name: Seagrass Restoration & Protection

causes.description: The Crane Trust protects habitat for Sandhill cranes and other wildlife along the Platte River and promotes environmental education in Central Nebraska.
causes.actionUnitDescription: square foot of Sandhill Crane habitat being protected for one year
causes.name: Sandhill Crane Habitat Protection

causes.description: The Ocean Cleanup is an organization that removes plastic and other waste from the world's oceans. Through scalable solutions, the organization has removed millions of kilograms from global waterways.
causes.actionUnitDescription: pound of ocean plastic being removed from the Pacific Ocean
causes.name: Ocean Plastic Removal

causes.description: The Green Omaha Coalition hosts environmental education events and meetups to grow advocacy in the Omaha metro.
causes.actionUnitDescription: seed packet is provided to an attendee at Earth Day Omaha
causes.name: Environmental Education in Omaha, NE
